title: Body Health System FORKED
description: Revamps the minecraft health system. Hard fork of Body Health System fixing issues and adding additional content.
body:
# BHSF, A next gen body health system mod for minecraft.

**BHSF is probably one, if not the most advanced body health systems that minecraft can offer.**

Alternatively download off [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/body-health-system-forked)

## Features + Improvements!

- Arrow raycasting, more accurate arrows.

- Lots of refactoring of the backend. Improving performance and stability from the original BHS.

- Wounding, Temperature, and Bone systems, for a more challenging experience.

- Highly configurable! Don't like a system, (Like wounding?) disable it with ease!

- Tons of new items for all your health related needs.

- Loads of bug fixes. The original BHS was left in a broken state, BHSF fixes that.


**Why was BHSF created?**

Mostly out of frustration with the lack of realistic body health systems. None of them really go indepth with their mechanics, and lack of customizability to fit every users needs. 


Spiritual successor for [Body Health system](https://modrinth.com/mod/body-health-system), the original mod made by [srgnis](https://modrinth.com/user/srgnis) big thanks to him for all his effort in the intial foundations.
